messages.content: Walk me through my schedule for today.
I don't have calendar access — can't pull your day. Want me to set a reminder instead?
Can't see your agenda from here. What's coming up that I can help with?
I don't have access to your appointments. Want me to remind you about one?
Do I have any meetings today?
Calendar isn't wired up on my side. If you tell me, I can set nudges.
What does my day look like?
I can't see your calendar, but happy to help plan it if you fill me in.
